name: Appetizer Pate' Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine croutons and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. Soften gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Combine cream cheese and braunschweiger, mixing at medium speed on electric mixer until well blended.
5. Gradually add gelatin.
6. Stir in remaining ingredients until blended; pour over crust.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Remove rim of pan.
